overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia jogging along a forest trail. The journey transitions from sunlit meadows through a narrow passage with a thatched hut, then into a misty dead forest area with rocky terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest meadow trail with wildflowers

agents.ego_description: Geralt jogging steadily along the forest path with swords bouncing on his back, moving through sunlit meadows

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and small stones
tall green and golden grass lining both sides of the trail
scattered pink and yellow wildflowers among the grass
mature deciduous trees with full green canopies casting shadows
moss-covered stone formation rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through a sunlit forest meadow along a dirt trail. Tall grass and wildflowers line the path while large oak trees cast dappled shadows across the ground, creating a warm, peaceful atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow path between stone wall and thatched hut

events.description: path narrows between rock face on left and wooden hut on right, entering enclosed corridor

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it squeezes between natural rock wall and man-made structure

entered.detail: small rustic dwelling with straw roof and weathered wooden walls
tall vertical mossy rock wall forming a natural corridor boundary

segments.scene_description: The trail narrows into a corridor between a mossy stone wall on the left and a rustic thatched hut on the right. The canopy becomes denser overhead, creating a more enclosed feeling as Geralt passes the solitary dwelling.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty dead forest with gnarled trees

events.description: atmosphere shifts to misty dead forest with fewer leaves, more bare branches, and atmospheric fog

agents.ego_description: jogging through increasingly desolate woodland with dead trees and misty atmosphere

entered.detail: leafless twisted trees with bare branches and dark bark
low-lying fog drifting between the tree trunks in the distance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow passage, the environment opens into a misty area dominated by dead, gnarled trees. The atmosphere becomes hazier and the vegetation shifts from green meadows to sparse, desolate woodland with fog between the trunks.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest trail with mixed tree cover

events.description: brief darkening as passing under dense tree canopy shadow, then returns to bright sunlight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path through rocky terrain with scattered boulders

entered.detail: large moss-covered boulders and rocky slope lining the right side of path
decaying log lying across the grassy ground

segments.scene_description: After a brief shadow under dense canopy, the trail continues through a rocky section of forest. Large boulders line the right side of the path while mixed live and dead trees create a varied woodland atmosphere with dappled sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a sunlit forest meadow gradually transforms into a desolate, misty woodland. It begins with Geralt jogging along a dirt trail through tall grass and wildflowers, where large oak trees cast dappled shadows across a warm landscape. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into an enclosed corridor between a mossy stone wall and a rustic thatched hut under a thickening canopy. The environment then opens into a hazy expanse of dead, gnarled trees and sparse vegetation, where the vibrant greens fade into a foggy, desolate atmosphere. Finally, the trail leads through a rocky section of the forest, passing large boulders and a mix of live and dead trees under shifting patches of sunlight.
